title: The Healer Starts Over!
overview: With the Demon Lord defeated, Keyaru’s revenge begins. The first step is to rewind time. Followed by planning…

title: The Healer Ruins Princess Flare!
overview: Flare has a dark side that Keyaru originally didn’t see until it was too late. Forgiveness isn’t something that he’s interested in now. So, he waits…

title: The Healer Buys a Slave!
overview: One does not forget the past, even if it hasn’t happened yet. Many people remain unpunished. Getting to them may require help, though.

title: The Healer Acquires Setsuna!
overview: How far will Setsuna go for revenge? Keyarga is curious to know.

title: The Healer Finds a New Toy!
overview: Keyarga’s actions have not gone unnoticed. He used the Krylet sword technique against Gioral soldiers. And one woman will not let the insult stand.

title: The Healer Sheds Blood and Tears!
overview: The cost of revenge is steep. Especially when innocents pay the price.

title: The Healer Executes Justice!
overview: They expected the Hero of Recovery. They planned on him being heroic. Unfortunately for them, Keyarga isn’t a hero.

title: The Healer Meets the Demon Lord!
overview: Keyarga knows this woman. She will become the Demon Lord and the enemy of all humankind. So, what is she doing in a city where humans and demonic beings coexist?

title: The Healer Takes Revenge for a Meal!
overview: Keyarga, Freia and Setsuna will protect Eve until she becomes the Demon Lord. But that protection comes at a price: The Philosopher’s Stone.

title: The Healer Becomes a Single, Lovely Flower!
overview: How does one catch a predator? Keyarga turns himself into the perfect bait.

title: The Healer is Troubled by Norn’s Brutality!
overview: Keara reads Blade’s memories and learns Norn plans to attack Branica in three days and with his new weapon, he hopes to take revenge.

title: The Healer Starts a New Journey!
overview: An unexpected development catches Norn off guard. She needs another plan, but that assumes she can first survive Keyarga’s wrath.
